exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S20-T2-A-E3
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill

def header_style(ws, coord):
    c = ws[coord]
    c.font = Font(bold=True, color="FFFFFF")
    c.fill = PatternFill("solid", fgColor="1F4E79")

wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws["A1"] = "H"
header_style(ws, "A1")
print(ws["A1"].font.bold)

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S20-T3-A-E3
def reconcile(det_sum, portada, tol=0.01):
    return abs(det_sum - portada) < tol
print(reconcile(22.0, 22.005))
print(reconcile(22.0, 23.0))

exercises.code:
# agentic_I2 explorer-read · S20-T3-B-E3
def validate_rows(rows, allowed):
    return [dept["dept"] for dept in rows if dept["dept"] not in allowed]
print(validate_rows([{"dept": "Lima"}, {"dept": "Ica"}], {"Lima", "Cusco"}))
